Description: Sprint 0: Clone to dev in under 10 minutes. Monorepo scaffold, empty api/web shells, Docker Compose core (postgres/redis), Makefile, minimal CI. No business code.
Sprint 1: Full Docker stack (RabbitMQ, Celery, n8n, MinIO, OTel, Grafana), Alembic baseline, verify-platform gate, staging ECS. No business code.
Sprint 2: JWT auth, RBAC, matter walls, domain entities, identity/cases schema, audit log, outbox, login UI.
Sprint 3: Case and client CRUD, participants, tasks, deadlines, notes, timeline API and UI.
Sprint 4: Document upload/OCR, async AI summary, approval flow, n8n private deploy, first workflow.
Sprint 5: Observability hardening, security, load tests, production AWS, go-live.
